## Description
Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🌍 Glossary (new language / new terms)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🎨 UI/CSS improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Backend improvement

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] Glossary JSON files are valid (if applicable)
